name: Tutorial Campaign
description: A three-stage tutorial introducing tactical combat fundamentals.

stages.name: Training Grounds
stages.description: Learn the basics of movement and combat.
stages.briefing: Welcome, recruit. The training grounds await. Move your units, strike the dummies, and prove you understand the fundamentals of combat.
stages.debriefing: Well fought! You've mastered the basics. But tougher challenges lie ahead.

stages.name: Courtyard Assault
stages.description: Take the castle courtyard from enemy forces.
stages.briefing: Enemy forces have seized the castle courtyard. Push through and eliminate all resistance.
stages.debriefing: The courtyard is ours. But the enemy has retreated into the depths below...

stages.name: Into the Depths
stages.description: Descend into the dungeon and defeat the final threat.
stages.briefing: The dungeon corridor stretches before you. Steel yourselves — the final battle awaits in the darkness.
